value.found_quote: **Sandbox mode**: What Codex can do technically (for example, where it can write and whether it can reach the network) when it executes model-generated commands.
value.rationale: The page explicitly defines "Sandbox mode" as one of two security control layers for Codex, describing it in nearly identical terms to the claim: it controls what Codex can do technically, such as where it can write and whether it can reach the network when executing model-generated commands. This is an exact match to the claim's description.
